disclaimers: Incentives are shown as EV only and never included in APY.
Numeric APY is withheld when Product Read marks reasons/quality as untrusted.

executionLoss.actionRequired: Execution loss metric not available in observation input.

activationConditions: Staking contract deployed on Plasma + audited
Merkle proof distribution pipeline operational
Staker share accounting integrated into observation sweep

incentivesEv.notes: Incentives shown as EV only; excluded from base APY.

eligibility.notes: Points accrue to any depositor with vault shares. Staking not yet required.

truthNotes: MEASURED: grossApyPct derived from onchain probe.
MEASURED: netApyPct computed by subtracting structural mgmt and perf fees.

strategyGuard.explanation: Observed carry is -0.002148% and below the configured 50 bps floor. Park in Aave sUSDe supply until carry recovers.

marketObserved.label: Market APY (Observed)
marketObserved.explanation: Carry gate active: live loop carry is below the 50 bps minimum, so the product should park in aave susde supply.

evidence.currentStrategyNote: Current strategy borrows USDT0 and leaves the borrow leg idle; it does not recurse through a swap back into sUSDe.

guard.explanation: Observed carry is -0.002148% and below the configured 50 bps floor. Park in Aave sUSDe supply until carry recovers.

productRealized.label: Product APY (Realized)
productRealized.explanation: Pending first settle: deposits are queued and the epoch is ready for settlement. Carry gate active: park in Aave sUSDe supply until carry recovers.

guard.explanation: Observed carry is -0.002148% and below the configured 50 bps floor. Park in Aave sUSDe supply until carry recovers.
